name: Dark Mode
description: Dark color mode for reduced-light environments.

overrides.description: Inverted default surface for dark mode.
Subtle border visible on dark backgrounds.

agentDocumentBlocks.purpose: Apply a dark color palette for low-light environments and user preference, maintaining WCAG AA contrast throughout.

items.description: Use dark for low-light comfort; use high-contrast for users with low vision requiring maximum contrast.

items.guidance: Always apply at the application root, not on individual components.
Do not mix dark-mode and light-mode semantic tokens on the same surface.
Applying dark theme only to part of a page while the rest remains light.
items.rationale: Instead: Use inline theme switching for isolated components; apply the theme at the root for global coverage.
